before_state.reason: This source tool can build and review Instagram write plans, but it does not yet save operation-specific before-state or provider backup data before applying them.

preconditions: dry-run approved by user before apply

rollback.notes: No built-in rollback, backups, snapshots, or provider restore are available in this runtime. Treat current Instagram write families as irreversible_and_clearly_labeled and use the saved plan and refusal output for manual follow-up only.

verification_plan.required_before_live_write: Add command-specific before-state or provider-backup support before allowing apply.
steps: Confirm no Instagram provider write or auth exchange endpoint was called.
Confirm no local token file was written by the write flow.
Confirm no successful write receipt was emitted.
